title: The Development [Server Edition]
description:
Server Edition of The Development
The Modpack allows the development of technology. Go to space! Do whatever you like! It's your world, and you have automation freedom!
body:
**THIS IS THE SERVER EDITION OF THE MODPACK, NOT MEANT FOR CLIENT USE!!! (it will work as a client side but may cause crashing issues due to no optimizations)**


The Modpack allows the development of technology. Go to space! Do whatever you like! It's your world, and you have automation freedom!


**HIGHLY SUGGEST HAVING JAVA MEMORY SETTINGS SET TO 4+GB OF RAM FOR THE SERVER EDITION**


"The Development" (perfect name trust lol) is a modpack centered on the Create mod and ad astra, the modpack includes Create mod, ad astra, AE2, Mekanism.



The Modpack allows the development of technology... Go to space! But start with Create Machines and work your way up...

Modpack changes world generation!

"The Development" was made for Multiplayer and Single-player for slow development, as the mods work together to allow players to slowly develop to space and colonize space! Work together in multiplayer using your voice as the pack includes Simple voice chat mod!


Fighting has changed! With the Simply Swords mod, you can find and craft runic and unique weapons! With the Better Combat Mod it makes them look even cooler!


Enchating, Enchanting has changed for enchant table as it may apply curses to tools you enchant, added a new kind of enchant table called Enchanting Infuser!


<details>
<summary>Client installation</summary>
Download the [Client Edition](https://modrinth.com/modpack/the-development) from Modrith and play!
</details>

<details>
<summary>Server installation</summary>
Download the modpack here and drag and drop the mods folder into your forge server! This modpack doesn't have any spsific configs
</details>


<details>
<summary>DISCLAIMER</summary>
I THE CREATOR OF THE MODPACK DO NOT OWN ANY OF THE MODS!
</details>
